name: Paradise Golf Driving Range
about: Paradise Golf Center is a year-round indoor/outdoor golf facility offering a comprehensive range of services including a driving range, miniature golf, simulators, lessons, and a pro shop. The venue is equipped with a GC2-powered Performance Simulator that allows players to use real equipment and real golf balls to experience golf on virtual courses without regard to weather. It features covered stalls for the driving range and provides various options for individual and group instruction, making it suitable for both practice and casual play. The facility is designed to be accessible to all skill levels, with pricing structures for buckets, lessons, and simulator time that cater to different needs and preferences.
why_golfers_like_it: All-weather operation with covered stalls and indoor simulators
GC2-powered technology used by premium brands like TaylorMade and PING
Family-friendly with free play for children under 4 and junior camps

food_and_drink.notes: No information about on-site food services

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium GC2-powered Performance Simulator used by major brands

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides golf equipment during lessons, but personal clubs are recommended for other activities.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of BYOB policies or food services on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: It takes approximately 1 hour per person to complete 18 holes once familiar with the system.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children under 4 play miniature golf for free with a paying adult, and they offer junior camps and clinics.
